concept.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' SET type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRootEntrypoint RETURN type AS ViewLayerRootEntrypoint

constraint.description: View sources form one closed world of allowed directories, depths, and top-level role file shapes.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE NOT coalesce(type.recognizedViewSource, false) RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, 'src/view/(leftbartabs|statetabs|dropdowns)/<entry>/ or src/view/slotcontent/<slot>/<entry>/' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn + ' [' + coalesce(type.viewRole, 'UNKNOWN') + ']' AS ActualDirection, CASE WHEN coalesce(type.wrongDirectory, false) THEN 'View code must live only in the documented active-root or reusable slotcontent directories.' WHEN coalesce(type.wrongDepth, false) THEN 'View code must be a direct top-level file in its active root or reusable slotcontent unit.' WHEN coalesce(type.knownForbiddenRole, false) THEN 'View code must not use foreign top-level roles such as PublishedEvent, InspectorEntry, ViewModel, PresentationModel, or Projector.' WHEN coalesce(type.unknownRoleForm, false) THEN 'View code must use only the documented top-level role file names.' ELSE 'View code must stay inside the closed active-root and reusable-slotcontent topology.' END AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: View contributions are the only shell-facing view-layer entrypoints.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' AND NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' AND NOT type.name ENDS WITH 'Contribution' RETURN DISTINCT type.relativePath AS Source, '*Contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, type.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'Each shell-facing view-layer entrypoint must be one contribution.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: Each contribution, binder, or projection-model source file owns exactly one top-level type.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (type:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType) WHERE type.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'MODEL'] AND NOT type.fqn CONTAINS '$' WITH type.relativePath AS source, collect(DISTINCT type.name) AS typeNames WHERE size(typeNames) <> 1 RETURN source AS Source, 'exactly one top-level contribution, binder, or ContributionModel/ContentModel type' AS ExpectedDirection, reduce(actual = '', typeName IN typeNames | CASE WHEN actual = '' THEN typeName ELSE actual + ', ' + typeName END) AS ActualDirection, 'A contribution, binder, or ContributionModel/ContentModel file must define exactly one top-level type.' AS Details ORDER BY Source

constraint.description: At least one shell contribution must exist.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (root:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerRootEntrypoint) WITH count(root) AS rootCount WHERE rootCount = 0 RETURN 'src/view/leftbartabs, src/view/statetabs, or shell-discovered src/view/dropdowns' AS Source, 'at least one shell contribution' AS ExpectedDirection, 'none' AS ActualDirection, 'The shell needs discoverable contributions.' AS Details

constraint.description: Contributions stay thin shell adapters and do not reach forbidden dependencies.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (source:Java:Type:SaltMarcher:ViewLayerType)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(target:Java:Type) WHERE source.viewBucket = 'CONTRIBUTION' WITH source, target, split(source.fqn, '.') AS sourceSegments, split(target.fqn, '.') AS targetSegments WHERE target.fqn =~ 'bootstrap\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.data\\..*' OR target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.host\\..*' OR (target.fqn =~ 'shell\\..*' AND NOT target.fqn =~ 'shell\\.api\\..*') OR target.fqn =~ 'src\\.domain\\..*' OR ( target.fqn =~ 'src\\.view\\..*' AND ( NOT (target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER', 'MODEL', 'HANDLER', 'VIEW', 'VIEW_INPUT_EVENT']) OR NOT ( size(sourceSegments) >= 4 AND size(targetSegments) >= 4 AND sourceSegments[2] = targetSegments[2] AND sourceSegments[3] = targetSegments[3] AND target.viewBucket IN ['CONTRIBUTION', 'BINDER'] ) ) ) RETURN DISTINCT source.relativePath AS Source, coalesce(target.relativePath, target.fqn) AS Target, 'contributions may depend only on shell.api and their Binder' AS ExpectedDirection, source.fqn + ' -> ' + target.fqn AS ActualDirection, 'View contributions must not depend on domain, data, bootstrap, shell internals, or the wrong view-layer role.' AS Details ORDER BY Source, Target
